name: Ocean View Resort
description: Experience luxury with a stunning view of the ocean. Includes free breakfast, swimming pool, and spa services.

name: Mountain Paradise
description: Escape to the beautiful mountains. Wake up to the view of snow-capped peaks and enjoy cozy wooden interiors.

name: City Core Hotel
description: Located in the heart of Mumbai. Perfect for business and leisure. Close to major shopping malls and attractions.

name: Eiffel Tower Inn
description: A classic romantic getaway in the center of Paris. Only 10 minutes walking distance from the Eiffel Tower.

name: Tokyo Zen Hotel
description: Minimalist Japanese aesthetics with modern amenities. Connect your mind to Zen culture.

name: Desert Oasis Camp
description: Luxury tents in the middle of the desert. Includes camel rides, dune bashing, and traditional dinner.
